accessible_restrooms.operating_hours: Match day: 4 hours before kick-off to 1 hour after final whistle

medical.emergency: Call 911 or use red emergency intercom at any gate

accessible_parking.pre_booking: Required, via FIFA Fan App or official site
accessible_parking.shuttle: Free accessible shuttle from Lot D every 10 minutes

public_transport.metro: NJ Transit direct from Penn Station (MetLife), Metro Silver Line (SoFi)
public_transport.accessible_services: All trains fully accessible; priority boarding for wheelchair users

fan_services.family_room: Gate D Lower Level — baby changing, nursing, quiet space
fan_services.sensory_kits: Available at Gate A and Gate D — earplugs, sunglasses, fidget tools
fan_services.sign_language: BSL/ASL interpretation available; request at Gate A info desk

sustainability.recycling_stations: Every 50 metres on all concourses — Paper, Plastic, Compost
sustainability.water_refill: Free water refill stations at Gates A, C, D and all concourses
sustainability.carbon_offset: All shuttle buses are electric; stadium powered by 100% renewable energy

concessions.allergen_free: All stands display allergen info; ask staff for guidance
